[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000011 3
1 00101101 4
2 00100000 1
3 01110100 4
4 11101100 5
5 11001000 3
6 00101100 3
7 00110000 2
